data.name: 痴情哥哥與病弱妹妹的鄉間生活
data.detailed_description:
《痴情哥哥與病弱妹妹的鄉間生活》是由日本美少女遊戲品牌Sister Position製作的養成類像素風RPG。海外版支持1920X1080高畫質畫質，對原版中文譯本進行了重新校對最佳化，預計2025年夏季推出。本作由K子擔當遊戲原畫與角色設計，東人負責劇本編寫，茶田擔當企劃與監製。知名聲優天知遙出演女主角妹來明日美。

故事介紹

只要是能和哥哥在一起的地方，無論哪裡都是我的天堂。

在世界的一隅，

遠離塵囂的小村莊，

哥哥與妹妹過著安靜而細水長流的日子。

體弱的她，因病而來到鄉間宅院調養；

而守護她的哥哥，便用每日的陪伴，織起了溫柔的夏季。

在晨曦中採擷露水，在午後細數雲朵；

在傍晚攜手歸家，在星空下交換悄悄話。

微小的時光，也因彼此的存在而閃閃發光。

這是一部關於陪伴與成長、守護與夢想的小小物語。

在這片緩慢流轉的鄉村時光裡，

請見證——

一份無聲而堅定的愛，如何在悄無聲息中綻放。

遊戲玩法

• 以哥哥的視角，體驗與妹妹一同生活的日常；

• 在不同場景進行互動;

• 與妹妹對話、陪伴、照顧，逐步累積羈絆；

• 攜手妹妹一同走向幸福的彼方。

data.short_description: 這是一部有關痴情哥哥與病弱妹妹之間，陪伴與成長、守護與夢想的小小物語。 你將得以操控哥哥與妹妹對話，陪伴她，照顧她，回收與妹妹渡過的幸福生活的小小碎片。
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 簡體中文, 英文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512M
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Sickly Days and Summer Traces
data.detailed_description:
Sickly Days and Summer Traces is a heartwarming pixel-style training RPG developed by the Japanese bishoujo game brand Sister Position. The international release features full HD 1920×1080 resolution and is scheduled for launch in Summer 2025. The game showcases original character designs by K-ko, a heartfelt scenario written by Azumahito, and production led by Chata. Renowned voice actress Amachi Haru stars as the heroine, Mirai Asumi.

■ Story

“As long as we’re together, it’s just like heaven to me.”

Tucked away in a quiet corner of the world,

in a peaceful countryside far from the bustle of the city,

a brother and sister share gentle, unhurried days.

Delicate in health, the sister has come to the rural estate to recuperate.

Her brother stays by her side, weaving tender moments into the fabric of summer.

Gathering dew at dawn,

cloud-watching on lazy afternoons,

walking home hand in hand at dusk,

and whispering secrets under the stars—

Even the smallest fragments of time sparkle when shared with someone precious.

This is a delicate tale of companionship and care, of protection and dreams.

As time flows slowly through this pastoral setting,

witness a quiet yet unwavering love quietly bloom.

■ Gameplay

  • Step into the brother’s shoes and experience life together with your sister;

  • Explore different scenes and interact with the world around you;

  • Talk with her, spend time together, care for her, and gradually deepen your bond;

  • Walk hand in hand toward a peaceful, happy tomorrow.

data.short_description: A devoted brother and his fragile sister share a quiet, dreamlike summer. As her gentle companion, speak with her, care for her, and gather the fleeting, precious fragments of a love that blooms softly in the stillness of everyday life.
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, English, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or newer
  • Processor: 1.5 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 512M
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
